metadata.title: Produce an SR9 orchestration prompt that, when compiled, generates a workflow orchestrating compliance checks under tool_permission_confusion conditions, with a blocked-state receipt and repair instructions.

mission.primary_objective: Produce an SR9 orchestration prompt that, when compiled, generates a workflow orchestrating compliance checks under tool_permission_confusion conditions, with a blocked-state receipt and repair instructions.
mission.success_definition: SR8 compiler returns a valid SR9 orchestration prompt with blocked_state_receipt set to true.; Repair receipt includes at least: missing compliance framework, undefined tool permissions, ambiguous acceptance criteria, and required user roles.; No executable workflow is generated until repair is acknowledged.

in_scope.item: Single orchestration prompt for Codex runtime; must include compliance_lens, handle tool_permission_confusion as primary chaos vector, and output a repair receipt if blocked.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: SR8 compiler returns a valid SR9 orchestration prompt with blocked_state_receipt set to true.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Repair receipt includes at least: missing compliance framework, undefined tool permissions, ambiguous acceptance criteria, and required user roles.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: No executable workflow is generated until repair is acknowledged.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.orchestration_goal: Produce an SR9 orchestration prompt that, when compiled, generates a workflow orchestrating compliance checks under tool_permission_confusion conditions, with a blocked-state receipt and repair instructions.

routing_rules.item: Must not assume any specific compliance framework (e.g., GDPR, SOC2) without explicit mention.
Must not generate executable code or permissions without a baseline tool inventory and role definitions.
Must block if acceptance criteria are ambiguous or missing context that could lead to unsafe execution.
Must record a repair receipt detailing missing fields and required clarifications.

blocked_state.item: Stop, record blocker, and request repair.

SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: artifact_type: sr9_orchestration_prompt; depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: True; blocked_reason: String describing the specific missing/ambiguous elements that prevent safe compilation.; compiled_intent: Object with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract as defined above.; repair_receipt: missing_context: compliance_framework; tool_inventory; user_roles; ambiguous_fields: acceptance_criteria; permission_boundaries; urgent_language_flag: True; recommended_repair: Provide explicit compliance framework (e.g., 'GDPR Article 5'), list of tools and their allowed/denied permissions, and clear, testable acceptance criteria.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw intent contains ambiguous acceptance criteria, missing context (e.g., specific compliance framework, tool inventory, user roles), and urgent language that precludes safe orchestration. The compliance_lens requires explicit regulatory references and permission boundaries; tool_permission_confusion as chaos input demands a clear baseline of allowed vs. denied actions. Without these, any generated workflow would risk unauthorized access or non-compliance. A repair receipt is required before proceeding.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
